subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! In this wondrous Dispensation and vernal season, the sapling of being hath been nourished, in the case of certain handmaidens of God, through the rains of heavenly grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این دور بدیع و فصل ربیع نهال وجود بعضى اماء الله از فیضان نیسان عنایت
